Uses of Class
co.edu.unbosque.cliente.model.Cliente

Packages that use Cliente
Package
Description
co.edu.unbosque.cliente.controller
Package containing REST controllers for client management.
co.edu.unbosque.cliente.repository
Package containing repository interfaces for client entities.
co.edu.unbosque.cliente.service
Package containing service classes for client management.

    Description

    POST /buscarPorCedula/{cedula} - lookup client by identification number.

    Method
    Description

    ClienteService.actualizar(Long id, Cliente nuevaData)
    Update an existing client after performing validation checks.

    ClienteService.crear(Cliente o)
